title: Celestialsapien Alien Evo Addon
description: A Palladium/AlienEvo Addon that lets you become Celestialsapien from Ben 10 Franchise
body:
![.](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1293688/description_89b27ddb-6b4e-4689-abe7-a7fe5dedf832.png)



###                                    [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/celestialsapien-palladium-alien-evo-addon)

###                                    [Trello/Wiki](https://trello.com/b/cYDqa3Nf/celestialsapien)




This is a Minecraft mod that introduces the celestialsapien power from ben 10 franchise that you can transform into and use the abilities



### Dependencies:
- [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
- [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Alien Evolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/alienevo)
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhino)
- [Cosmic Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmic-horizons-cosmos)





**Dimensions like Nullvoid and Forge of creation is planned and will be added on further updates**
